title: PCR
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"7mj3l","text":"Please wear gloves for the experiment,  don't try to touch the lid after PCR program initiation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set up a small box with ice, put DNA and 2×high Taq Master Mix into it before going into the Bio-rad S1000TM thermocycler cycler.Set up a small box with ice, put DNA and 2×high Taq Master Mix into it before going into the Bio-rad S1000TM Thermo Cycler.
Add the following reagent to a PCR tube.(50 μl). %s %s 2×high Taq Master Mix (Enzyme) 25 μl Template 2 μl Forward Primer (10 μM) 2 μl Reverse Primer (10 μM) 2 μl ddH2O 19 μl
Program the thermocycler as follows: %s %s 98℃ 5 min 98℃ 15 s Tm-4℃ 15 s 72℃ （5-10s）× (1 kb) 72℃ 5 min 4℃ forever
